productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Premier Aztrec 3 Grey Shoe
description: The reebok Premier Aztrec is a versatile running trainer that can take you from your workout to a day out effortlessly. This pair is a great mix of understated style, comfort and versatility. Wear it with performance clothes when playing, or team it with jeans or shorts and t-shirts for that casual look.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathability and structure Mesh tongue and collar with textile lining for excellent snug Fit PlayDry moisture wicking lining to keep the feet dry Brand logo on the sides increase style and act as reinforcements Lace-ups for snug, customised fit Brand name appliqued on the tongue and printed on the back Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort DMX Ride technology provides superior cushioning Phylon midsole for greater durability and comfort Outsole DMPRTEK rubber outsole in forefoot adds durable cushioning High-abrasion rubber outsole for increased durability Scooped heel for greater cushioning to the heel Flex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feet Multi-directional pattern on the outsole for excellent grip Transition bridge on the midsole allows for greater stability Rubber outsole extended to the toe box and embedded onto it for durability and forefoot protection shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
